turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Entendido, gracias por la información. Me gustaría agendar una cita para un cheque

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hi, I’d like

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: AI.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, I’m not Alex. I’m looking to book a check-up—can you help with that?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Alex?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can help with that. Please provide the patient's full name and date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it’s Jamie Thompson, born June 5th, 1985.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yes, that’s correct.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just to confirm, I have your name as Jamie Thompson and your date of birth as June 5th, 1985.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If so, could you please spell your first and last name for me?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it’s J-A-M-I-E for the first name, and Thompson, T-H-O-M-P-S-O-N.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, yeah,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If so, please provide the number you have on file with us.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If you're not sure, just confirm your first and last name and date of birth for me one more time.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: It's Jamie Thompson, June 5th, 1985.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, that’d be great. Yes, please connect me to them.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to connect you to our patient support team?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please wait.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Goodbye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, thanks for your help. Goodbye.
